overview: A multi-canister factory skeleton that proves the factory spawn, register, link, and inter-canister call pattern works end-to-end on the Internet Computer. The factory canister dynamically creates independent child Family canisters, registers them, links them with typed relationship edges, and can call into them — all observable through a minimal admin harness UI.
features: Factory canister spawns independent child Family canisters via the management canister
Each child canister has its own isolated state (rootName, familyId)
Family registry with full record: familyId, canister id, rootName, parent, timestamp
Relationship edges between families (childOf / spouseOriginOf) with manual and auto-linking
Inter-canister ping: factory calls child's whoAmI to prove addressability
Minimal admin harness: Plant a tree form, Families table with inline Ping, Edges table, Link families form
